title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 174.285 - Harris
text:
174.285.  Harris-Stowe State University, mission statement. — Harris-Stowe State University is hereby designated and shall hereafter be operated as an institution with a statewide mission in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics (STEM) for underrepresented and underresourced students.
(L. 2021 H.B. 297)
